name: logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 10–50 shipments/day tool
description: For logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 10–50 shipments/day, delayed shipment notifications cause missed delivery deadlines. We provide real-time exception alerts instead of manual tracking of shipment statuses through multiple platforms.
